name: Flammable_Oils_QUICKFIX
title: Flammable_Oils_QUICKFIX
description: Pipes, storage tanks, and other fluid-handling entities can catch fire and explode. Optional solid-item fires affect belts, ground stacks, and destroyed cargo (original mod by Klonan and OwnlyMe).
author: Fr_Dae, Pi-c, Kannagimoe, Klonan, lily
